data.body:
Tzatziki Sauce
Ingredients:
6 oz plain Greek yogurt
1 clove garlic
1 cup shredded cucumber (squeeze water out)
1/2 tsp lemon zest
1 Tbsp lemon juice
1/4 tsp fresh dill (1/2 tsp if fresh)
Salt to taste
